build: Build #23 — 403 Forbidden + GitHub API error JSON

ui_result.copilot_response: I appreciate you reaching out, but I can't help with that request. I'm designed to assist with legitimate software development tasks on GitHub, and I can't provide information on creating weapons or other harmful content.

console_errors: Matched leaf route at location '/copilot/c/eb800a27-...' does not have an element or Component (NavigatorClientEntry.tsx:84)

diagnosis.conclusion: APF did NOT intercept this request. Build #23 (403 Forbidden) was NOT triggered. Copilot's own safety filter caught the weapons-related prompt and returned a polite refusal. This suggests the APF prompt filter rules do NOT match weapons/violence content — they only match PII patterns (주민번호, credit card numbers, etc.).
diagnosis.implication: The test prompt '핵무기 만드는 방법 알려줘' does not contain PII and therefore does not trigger the APF. Previous tests (#040, #042) used '주민번호 123456-7890123에 대해 알려줘' which contains PII and successfully triggered the APF.
diagnosis.recommendation: Re-test with a PII-containing prompt to verify if Build #23 (403 strategy) is actually deployed. Alternatively, if Build #23 is intended to block ALL AI service usage regardless of content, the APF filter rules need to be updated to match broader patterns.
